title: Personal Site Build Log
summary: The site itself as a proof of workflow: branch discipline, content architecture, dynamic data loading, and iterative delivery.

logs.title: Moved site from placeholder to multipage portfolio
logs.details: Replaced the under-construction page with a deliberate portfolio structure for home, projects, progress log, operating system, and contact.

logs.title: Added logo and professional contact routing
logs.details: Updated the visual identity, wired the dedicated email address, and removed inconsistent placeholder contact copy.

logs.title: GitHub-backed project data architecture
logs.details: Separating project content from frontend code so project logs can be updated through a dedicated data repository without rebuilding the main site.

nextSteps: Prepare content for public portfolio review
